text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is about to begin, and Sakura
Chiyono O is overcome with nervousness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This is quite literally a once in a lifetime race, after all. Plus, she'll be competing against other racers—other rivals—that stand in the way of her road to the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With determination in their eyes, the racers set
out to claim victory—Yaeno Muteki for her
grandfather, and Sakura Chiyono O for her role
model!
